MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGMENT, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the request for punitive damages. Punitive damages are sufficiently stated under CC 1786.50(b). Motion is granted as to the request for injunctive and equitable relief under the first cause of action.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGMENT, LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege facts in support of each element of the cause of action for invasion of privacy; and to allege justiciable present controversy as to each Plaintiff regarding a coming up lease renewal recertification requiring investitive consumer report.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
